What we're building

Our Games

Sudokiller

Sudokiller is a cozy mystery puzzle game where you place suspects on a sudoku-style grid to unmask a killer hiding in plain sight. Every guest leaves a clue pinning down where they stood at the time of the murder. Deduce your way through case after case in this cozy, cleverly deceptive mystery.

Play for free on Steam

A cozy newsletter where you will get a fun new logic puzzle every week, along with updates and new releases.

Who’s behind Tranqui Games

Two people making games with care.

We are a duo from Argentina, starting our partnership in 2026. We love playing games, creating cozy little worlds, and we are excited to share our own games with everyone.

Manux

Wizard, multimedia designer. Chocolate and tea are the fuel to his creativity.

Rev

Druid. Only works properly after a good dose of fantasy books.
